panels.description: Latest jobs count written by the collector for the selected customer/site/server.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "veeam_server_summary" and r._field == "jobs")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.customer =~ /^${customer:regex}$/ and r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/ and r.server =~ /^${server:regex}$/)
  |> last()

panels.title: Jobs

panels.title: Object Stores

panels.description: Shows what each collector step tried against the Veeam REST API. Result=success means the endpoint returned data or an empty valid response. Result=skipped means Veeam returned Forbidden, Not Found, Method Not Allowed, or another error. This is collection health, not backup job health.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "veeam_endpoint_status")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.customer =~ /^${customer:regex}$/ and r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/ and r.server =~ /^${server:regex}$/)
  |> group(columns:["collector", "endpoint", "status", "_field"])
  |> last()
  |> group(columns:["collector", "endpoint", "status"])
  |> pivot(rowKey:["collector", "endpoint", "status"], columnKey:["_field"], valueColumn:"_value")
  |> keep(columns:["collector", "endpoint", "status", "available", "item_count", "duration_ms", "error"])
  |> rename(columns:{collector:"Collector step", endpoint:"Veeam API endpoint", status:"Result", available:"Available", item_count:"Items collected", duration_ms:"Duration ms", error:"Meaning / Error"})

panels.title: Veeam API Collection Health

panels.description: VMs known to Veeam-derived collector data where no backup restore point was found. A VM can only appear here if Veeam exposes it through inventory, restore points, task sessions, or replication jobs.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "veeam_vm_protection")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "no_backup" and r._value == 1)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.customer =~ /^${customer:regex}$/ and r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/ and r.server =~ /^${server:regex}$/)
  |> group(columns:["vm", "protection_status", "protection_type"])
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns:["_time", "vm", "protection_status", "protection_type", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns:{_value:"No backup"})

panels.title: VMs With No Backup

targets.query:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "veeam_job_category_summary")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.customer =~ /^${customer:regex}$/ and r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/ and r.server =~ /^${server:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "count")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.description: Repository free and used bytes for the selected repository.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "veeam_repository")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "free_bytes" or r._field == "used_bytes")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.customer =~ /^${customer:regex}$/ and r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/ and r.server =~ /^${server:regex}$/ and r.repository =~ /^${repository:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Repository Capacity

panels.description: Protection state for the selected VM variable. Use the Protection dashboard for drill-down tables.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "veeam_vm_protection")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "protected" or r._field == "no_backup" or r._field == "stale_backup" or r._field == "stale_replication")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.customer =~ /^${customer:regex}$/ and r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/ and r.server =~ /^${server:regex}$/ and r.vm =~ /^${vm:regex}$/)
  |> last()

panels.title: Selected VM Protection

panels.description: Failed VM task/session rows in the selected time range.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "veeam_vm_task_session")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.result == "Failed" or r.status == "Failed")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.customer =~ /^${customer:regex}$/ and r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/ and r.server =~ /^${server:regex}$/)
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey:["_field"], valueColumn:"_value")
  |> keep(columns:["_time", "customer", "site", "server", "job_category", "job_name", "vm", "failure_message", "duration_seconds"])

panels.title: Failed Jobs and VM Tasks
